data.body: SCOPE UPDATE (user-directed, 2026-06-15): story 25ae-92e6-2927-49b6 'Implement Jira reconciler link/relation sync' is now a CHILD of this epic (reparented from discovered_from). Empirical verification (task 2b45, closed) proved link sync was never wired (NOT a migration regression — reconciler always Python; inert since upstream extraction b534f47a) and the link client primitives are broken live (set_relationship passes --json rejected by ACLI; get_issue_links parses wrong shape). TDD specs landed as xfail(strict) in tests/{integration/rebar_reconciler/test_link_sync.py, external/test_link_sync_live.py}. Epic now closes when a,b,c (done) + d (in progress) + e + 25ae are all closed. Sequencing: finish (d) test reorg, then implement 25ae link sync (green-up the TDD xfails), then (e) SDET review loop as the closing gate.
